reviews.review_msg: Beyond fantastic. Really knows his stuff and is incredibly humble and encouraging when presented with a superior and/or alternative solution to a problem.
He's a friendly giant and can explain pretty much anything. Thanks to him i got an A- in math 232
Awesome teacher.  Does a great job teaching math and actually makes it fun.  Assignments, midterms were relatively fair but final was brutal !
Good proff overall, can actually teach math. class passes by super quickly. hw, and midterms werent too bad, but final was a killer :(

excellent prof. if you have trouble with math, he would be the teacher to teach you.  strong ability to teach students the fundamentals of math.  each concept thoroughly explained.  Always available for help.  Nice guy.  Can simplify difficult concepts.  creates a fun and comfortable classroom environment.
He is very funny, and a nice intructor. His midterms are easier than the homework assignments.

I never took calculus in highschool, so I was quite afraid of taking this course.  But I was soo lucky to have been in Bruce's lecture.  He was funny, and definitely made calculus enjoyable.  YES, Enjoyable!  It's not the easiest material, but I'd still say it was probably one of the better courses I've taken.  One of the best profs I've had.
Super nice guy!  Smart, funny, great at teaching and makes MATH CLASS fun!
Bruce!  Awesome math prof.  Funny as hell and very kind.  Good marker and did i mention, funny?
